item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 9min #SOUNDING OFF — NBC Sports Analyst & Foreplay Pod host Kevin Kisner SOUNDS OFF on CBS for
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 9min #SOUNDING OFF — NBC Sports Analyst & Foreplay Pod host Kevin Kisner SOUNDS OFF on CBS for its coverage of The Masters Tournament: “I have no idea what they’re doing… literally no idea.”
(Via: @ForePlayPod , h/t @JoshACarpenter ) De Josh Carpenter 4 5 51 6 mil

item.title:
PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 12min 80% owned. 15% captained.
PGA TOUR Fantasy gamers trusted in McIlroy to repeat at The Masters
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 12min 80% owned. 15% captained.
PGA TOUR Fantasy gamers trusted in McIlroy to repeat at The Masters.
(Presented by @JLabAudio ) 1 3 27 10 mil

item.title: Betgolfworld: Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 15min What a laugh... It doesn't take a brain surgeon to work out why they've ran a story li
item.description:
Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 15min What a laugh... It doesn't take a brain surgeon to work out why they've ran a story like this... Cita Belfast Telegraph @BelTel · 10h 'While McIlroy is adored in his hometown and revered by almost-all Irish golf fans, you don’t need to look too far to find those from this island they don’t care for the former Sullivan Upper pupil.'
https:// belfasttelegraph.co.uk/sport/how-holy wood-helps-explain-why-rory-mcilroy-puts-friends-family-and-his-hometown-club-ahead-of-flags-and-jingoism/a/145676497.html …
https:// belfasttelegraph.co.uk/sport/how-holy wood-helps-explain-why-rory-mcilroy-puts-friends-family-and-his-hometown-club-ahead-of-flags-and-jingoism/a/145676497.html … 1 3 371

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 1h Here's a snippet of NBC golf analyst Kevin Kisner's rant against CBS and its Masters
item.description:
Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 1h Here's a snippet of NBC golf analyst Kevin Kisner's rant against CBS and its Masters coverage on @ForePlayPod .
"What are we doing? You have no commercials. Play live shots." 39 23 773 72 mil
